column1: Helen _____ not know that Peter is here.
Ты не мог видеть меня на вечеринке вчера, я не ходил туда.

column2: You couldn’t have seen me at the party yesterday because I didn’t go there.
You may not have seen me at the party yesterday because I didn’t go there.
You don't dare seen me at the party yesterday because I didn’t go there.

column1: Где собака? Может быть она на кухне или во дворе.

column2: Where’s the dog? It could be in the kitchen or it may be outside.
Where’s the dog? It can be in the kitchen or it may be outside.
Where’s the dog? It may be in the kitchen or it may be outside.

column1: Не может быть, чтобы он работал круглые сутки.

column2: He don't dare work all day round.

column1: Вам не нужно изменять весь текст, так как начало в порядке.

column2: You don't dare change the whole text as the beginning is all right.
You can not change the whole text as the beginning is all right.
You need not change the whole text as the beginning is all right.
Helen may have been working all day yesterday.
Helen could have been working all day yesterday.

column1: Он посмел прийти сюда после всего того, что он мне сказал?

column2: Dare he come here after everything he told me?
Can he come here after everything he told me?
Must he come here after everything he told me?
